channel.title: Washington Hot Springs Directory
channel.description: Recent content on Washington Hot Springs Directory

item.title: Sol Duc Hot Springs
item.description:
Sol Duc Hot Springs

Olympic Hot Springs in Olympic National Park

Temperature: 78°F
Fee: $18
GPS: 47.9689° N, 123.8631° W
Access: Drive-up
Hours: 9 AM - 8 PM
Season: Year-round
Clothing: Required

Access & Logistics

Road Condition: Paved, narrow last 2 miles
Parking: Lot fills by 11 AM weekends
Cell Coverage: Verizon: 1 bar, AT&T: none

Fees & Payment

Fee Notes: Cash only, no ATM nearby

When to Visit

Best Time: Weekday mornings before 10 AM
Avoid When: Holiday weekends
Maintenance: Closed first Tuesday of each month

item.title: Trip Planner
item.description:
Plan your perfect hot springs road trip through Washington State. Select multiple springs, optimize your route, and get turn-by-turn directions.

How to Use

  1. Select Springs: Browse all hot springs and add the ones you want to visit
  2. Set Starting Point: Enter your starting address or use your current location
  3. Optimize Route: We’ll calculate the most efficient driving order
  4. Explore: View your route on the map with POI recommendations
  5. Save & Share: Save your trip or share it with friends

Features

  • 📍 Select multiple hot springs
  • 🗺️ Optimize driving route
  • 📝 Turn-by-turn directions
  • 💡 Nearby restaurants & gas stations
  • 💾 Save trips to browser
  • 🔗 Shareable trip URLs
  • 🗺️ Export to Google Maps

Start planning your hot springs adventure today!
